Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Continued To Sep-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Judith Hehir, in court, for Frank D. Willey, III, Petitioner.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Oct-21-2015 is admitted to probate. Frank D. Willey, III is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-08-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Continued To Aug-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
